detaileddescription.para: This macro attempts to cast a pointer to a compound type to a vlc_object_t pointer in a type-safe manner. It checks if the compound type actually starts with an embedded vlc_object_t structure.

memberdef.name: add_overflow
memberdef.initializer: _Generic(*(r), \ unsigned: uadd_overflow(a, b, (unsigned *)(r)), \ unsigned long: uaddl_overflow(a, b, (unsigned long *)(r)), \ unsigned long long: uaddll_overflow(a, b, (unsigned long long *)(r)))

memberdef.name: mul_overflow
memberdef.initializer: _Generic(*(r), \ unsigned: umul_overflow(a, b, (unsigned *)(r)), \ unsigned long: umull_overflow(a, b, (unsigned long *)(r)), \ unsigned long long: umulll_overflow(a, b, (unsigned long long *)(r)))

memberdef.name: FREENULL
memberdef.initializer: do { free( a ); a = NULL; } while(0)

memberdef.name: LICENSE_MSG
memberdef.initializer:
_("This program comes with NO WARRANTY, to the extent permitted by " \ "law.
You may redistribute it under the terms of the GNU General " \ "Public License;
see the file named COPYING for details.
" \ "Written by the VideoLAN team; see the AUTHORS file.
")

detaileddescription.para: High precision date or time interval

Store a high precision date or time interval. The maximum precision is the microsecond, and a 64 bits integer is used to avoid overflows (maximum time interval is then 292271 years, which should be long enough for any video). Dates are stored as microseconds since a common date (usually the epoch). Note that date and time intervals can be manipulated using regular arithmetic operators, and that no special functions are required.
See http://www.webartz.com/fourcc/ for a very detailed list.

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* vlc_callback_t) (vlc_object_t *, char const *, vlc_value_t, vlc_value_t, void *)
memberdef.name: vlc_callback_t

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* vlc_list_callback_t) (vlc_object_t *, char const *, int, vlc_value_t *, void *)
memberdef.name: vlc_list_callback_t

detaileddescription.para: Translate a vlc_fourcc into its string representation. This function assumes there is enough room in psz_fourcc to store 4 characters in.

parameterdescription.para: string to store string representation of vlc_fourcc in

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned long a, unsigned long b, unsigned long *res)
memberdef.name: uaddl_overflow

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned long long a, unsigned long long b, unsigned long long *res)
memberdef.name: uaddll_overflow

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned long a, unsigned long b, unsigned long *res)
memberdef.name: umull_overflow

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned long long a, unsigned long long b, unsigned long long *res)
memberdef.name: umulll_overflow

detaileddescription.para: Reads 16 bits in network byte order
Reads 32 bits in network byte order
Reads 64 bits in network byte order
Writes 16 bits in network byte order
Writes 32 bits in network byte order
Writes 64 bits in network byte order
Writes 16 bits in little endian order
Writes 32 bits in little endian order
Writes 64 bits in little endian order

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *s, const char *p, unsigned long n) VLC_FORMAT_ARG(1) VLC_FORMAT_ARG(2)
memberdef.name: vlc_ngettext

detaileddescription.para: This file is a collection of common definitions and types
